positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for luke_hang_out_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth_sibling(luke)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~hang_out_with_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth_sibling(X0) | hang_out_with_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~hang_out_with_siblings(X0) | live_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(X0) | ~live_at_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define born_together_siblings(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complain_annoying_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
